chapter_title.ar: باب الْوَصِيِّ يُدْرِكُ أَيْتَامُهُ فَيَمْتَنِعُونَ مِنْ أَخْذِ مَالِهِمْ وَ مَنْ يُدْرِكُ وَ لَا يُؤْنَسُ مِنْهُ الرُّشْدُ وَ حَدِّ الْبُلُوغِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 39 – The executor, orphans (under his care) become adults, but they shy away from taking their wealth, and the one who is an adult does not have the understanding of the guidance, and the limit of the adulthood

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/108)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/108)
text: سَأَلْتُ الرِّضَا عَنْ وَصِيِّ أَيْتَامٍ تُدْرِكُ أَيْتَامُهُ فَيَعْرِضُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَنْ يَأْخُذُوا الَّذِي لَهُمْ فَيَأْبَوْنَ عَلَيْهِ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ قَالَ ( عليه السلام ) يَرُدُّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَ يُكْرِهُهُمْ عَلَى ذَلِكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Sa’ad Bin Ismail, from his father who said,

‘I asked Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about an executor of orphans, whose orphans become away (adults), but they turn away from taking that which is for them, so they refuse against him. So how should he deal with it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should return upon them (the legacy) and compel them upon that’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Sa‘d ibn ’Isma‘il from his father who has narrated the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the executor of the will under whose supervision the orphans become adults and the executor of the will hands over their assets to them but they refuse to accept. What must he do? He (the Imam) said, ‘They are made to accept their assets.”
